title: Pather Panchali
author: Bibhutibhushan Bandyopadhyay
description: A touching story of rural Bengal through the life of a poor family and their struggles.

title: Devdas
author: Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay
description: A tragic love story that explores societal norms and emotional conflict.

title: Lalsalu (Tree Without Roots)
author: Syed Waliullah
description: A powerful novel about religion, power, and manipulation in a rural village.

title: Hajar Bochor Dhore
author: Zahir Raihan
description: A portrayal of village life and traditions over generations in Bengal.

title: Ami Topu
author: Muhammad Zafar Iqbal
description: A popular science fiction story for young readers with imagination and adventure.

title: Shanku Samagra
author: Muhammad Zafar Iqbal
description: A collection of thrilling science fiction stories filled with innovation and curiosity.

title: Roktoakta Prantor
author: Munier Chowdhury
description: A dramatic depiction of the historical struggle and cultural identity.

title: Computer Fundamentals
author: Dr. Mohammad Kaykobad
description: An introduction to basic computing concepts and problem-solving techniques.

title: Digital Bangladesh Vision
author: Mustafa Jabbar
description: Insights into the technological transformation and digital development of Bangladesh.

title: Aranyak
author: Bibhutibhushan Bandyopadhyay
description: A novel exploring the beauty of forests and the relationship between humans and nature.

title: Feluda Stories
author: Satyajit Ray
description: A collection of detective stories featuring the famous Bengali sleuth Feluda.

title: Quantum Mechanics Basics
author: Dr. Jamal Nazrul Islam
description: An accessible introduction to fundamental concepts in quantum physics.
